signals.raw:
US Nearing $20 Billion Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence** [4]

Ethereum price rose to ~$2,358 on April 17 amid reports of US-Iran de-escalation talks, triggering a broad crypto rally with Bitcoin hitting $76,370[1][4]. This geopolitical optimism, including potential weekend negotiations, fueled a 14% weekly ETH surge and lifted Polymarket odds to 56% YES for $4
